ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the customer's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the customer's location */,
  "number_of_referrals" INTEGER /* Number of referrals the customer has made */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status of the customer */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred communication method of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the billing plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the billing plan */,
  "monthly_charge" REAL /* Monthly charge for the billing plan */,
  "billing_cycle_type" TEXT /* Type of billing cycle */,
  "billing_plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the billing plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_services" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "tenure_in_months" INTEGER /* Tenure of the customer in months */,
  "offer" TEXT /* Offer associated with the service */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle for the bill */,
  "total_charge" REAL /* Total charge for the bill */,
  "bill_status" TEXT /* Status of the bill */,
  "bill_due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_status" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "churn_category" TEXT /* Category of churn (e.g., Stayed, Churned) */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for churn (if applicable) */,
  "churn_date" TEXT /* Date of churn */,
  "churn_reason_category" TEXT /* Category of churn reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_services" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "internet_type" TEXT /* Type of internet service */,
  "avg_monthly_gb_download" REAL /* Average monthly GB download */,
  "internet_speed" REAL /* Speed of the internet service */,
  "internet_data_limit" REAL /* Data limit of the internet service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_services" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "streaming_tv" TEXT /* Streaming TV service */,
  "streaming_movies" TEXT /* Streaming movies service */,
  "streaming_music" TEXT /* Streaming music service */,
  "tv_package_type" TEXT /* Type of TV package */,
  "tv_channel_lineup" TEXT /* Lineup of TV channels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_services" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "online_security" TEXT /* Online security service */,
  "online_backup" TEXT /* Online backup service */,
  "device_protection_plan" TEXT /* Device protection plan */,
  "security_service_type" TEXT /* Type of security service */,
  "security_service_status" TEXT /* Status of the security service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tech_support" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "premium_tech_support" TEXT /* Premium tech support service */,
  "tech_support_service_type" TEXT /* Type of tech support service */,
  "tech_support_service_status" TEXT /* Status of the tech support service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city")
)
column_names: Number of dependents of the customer
Number of referrals the customer has made
Preferred communication method of the customer
Unique identifier for each billing plan
Monthly charge for the billing plan
Tenure of the customer in months
Data limit of the internet service
Status of the tech support service
